references.title_en: SWE-Skills-Bench: Do Agent Skills Actually Help in Real-World Software Engineering?
references.title_zh: SWE-Skills-Bench：Agent Skills 是否真的帮助真实软件工程
references.summary_zh: 直接评估 skill 边际收益。核心方法是 with-skill / without-skill 配对实验，并同时记录通过率、token 开销、适配风险和退化案例。
references.summary_en: Directly evaluates skill marginal utility through with-skill vs without-skill paired evaluation, while tracking pass-rate gain, token overhead, mismatch risk, and regressions.
references.reliability_notes: New preprint but highly aligned with this library's core goal.

references.title_en: τ-bench: A Benchmark for Tool-Agent-User Interaction in Real-World Domains
references.title_zh: τ-bench：真实领域中的工具-Agent-用户交互评测
references.authors_or_org: Shunyu Yao, Noah Shinn, Pedram Razavi, Karthik Narasimhan
references.summary_zh: 用模拟用户、领域政策、API 工具和数据库终态评估 agent。pass^k 和状态校验适合迁移到 skill 稳定性指标。
references.summary_en: Evaluates agents with simulated users, domain policies, API tools, and database final-state checks. pass^k and state validation map well to skill reliability metrics.
references.reliability_notes: Strong benchmark paper for tool-using agent reliability.

references.title_en: AgentBoard: An Analytical Evaluation Board of Multi-turn LLM Agents
references.title_zh: AgentBoard：多轮 LLM Agent 分析评估板
references.summary_zh: 指出只看最终成功率不够，需要 fine-grained progress rate。适合衡量 skill 失败前推进到了哪一步。
references.summary_en: Argues that final success rate is insufficient and introduces fine-grained progress rate, useful for measuring how far a skill gets before failure.

references.title_en: StableToolBench: Towards Stable Large-Scale Benchmarking on Tool Learning of Large Language Models
references.title_zh: StableToolBench：稳定的大规模工具学习评测
references.summary_zh: 指出真实在线 API 的状态变化会污染评估结果。适合指导 skill eval 使用 mock、simulator、缓存和稳定测试环境。
references.summary_en: Shows that live API instability can pollute tool-use evaluation. Supports mocks, simulators, caching, and stable test environments for skill evals.
references.reliability_notes: Highly practical for reproducible skill testing.

references.authors_or_org: Percy Liang et al. / Stanford CRFM
references.summary_zh: 强调多场景、多指标评估，而不是单一 accuracy。可迁移为 skill 指标体系：效果、鲁棒性、效率、安全、适用范围。
references.summary_en: Emphasizes multi-scenario and multi-metric evaluation beyond accuracy. Maps to skill effectiveness, robustness, efficiency, safety, and scope.
references.reliability_notes: Mature evaluation paper; model-level focus must be adapted to skills.

references.title_en: Measuring AI Ability to Complete Long Software Tasks
references.title_zh: 衡量 AI 完成长软件任务的能力
references.summary_zh: 提出 task-completion horizon，用任务时长和成功率衡量长任务能力。适合 skill 的长度上限、复杂度上限和可靠完成区间。
references.summary_en: Introduces task-completion horizon using task duration and success rate. Useful for skill length limits, complexity limits, and reliable completion ranges.
references.reliability_notes: Software-task focused; recalibrate for other domains.

references.title_en: How Do AI Agents Spend Your Money? Analyzing and Predicting Token Consumption in Agentic Coding Tasks
references.title_zh: AI Agent 如何消耗成本：Agentic 编码任务的 Token 消耗分析
references.summary_zh: 研究 agentic coding 的 token 消耗、波动和成本效率。可迁移为 tokens_per_success、cost variance、cost-quality frontier。
references.summary_en: Studies token consumption, variance, and cost efficiency in agentic coding. Maps to tokens per success, cost variance, and cost-quality frontier.

references.title_en: Agent-SafetyBench: Evaluating the Safety of LLM Agents
references.title_zh: Agent-SafetyBench：评估 LLM Agent 安全性
references.summary_zh: 覆盖 agent 交互环境、工具使用、安全风险和失败模式。适合转化为 skill 的越权、误用、防护和拒绝指标。
references.summary_en: Covers interactive environments, tool use, safety risks, and failure modes. Useful for skill metrics around overreach, misuse, guardrails, and refusal.

references.title_en: AgentEval: DAG-Structured Step-Level Evaluation for Agentic Workflows with Error Propagation Tracking
references.title_zh: AgentEval：带错误传播追踪的 DAG 步骤级 Agent 工作流评估
references.authors_or_org: Dongxin Guo, Jikun Wu, Siu Ming Yiu
references.summary_zh: 把复杂 agent 工作流建模为步骤 DAG，用于检测失败、追踪错误传播和定位根因。适合 skill 的阶段指标、依赖图和失败归因。
references.summary_en: Models complex agent workflows as step DAGs for failure detection, error propagation tracking, and root-cause attribution. Useful for skill stage metrics and failure analysis.
references.reliability_notes: New preprint; use as architecture inspiration, not final benchmark truth.
